topics.title: Artie's Gambling and Weight Loss
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie’s recent revelations regarding his decision to seek psychiatric help for gambling addiction and his commitment to a weight loss program.

topics.title: Artie's Career and Personal Struggles
topics.summary: The studio explores Artie's transition away from gambling, his struggles with the demands of touring for comedy, and his future career goals in television.

topics.title: Sam Simon Foundation and Satellite Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of satellite radio, the business success of Mel Williams, and a profile of Sam Simon’s charitable work with service dogs for the deaf.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Political Outlook
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential merger of Sirius and XM satellite radio, the influence of terrestrial radio on federal policy, and the upcoming 2008 presidential election.

topics.title: Howard Stern and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Congressman Anthony Weiner regarding his past as a roommate of John Stewart, followed by an appearance by George Takei and a discussion on the 'Battle of the Blobs' weight-loss competition among staff members.

topics.title: Acting Career and Celebrity Tributes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of selecting film scripts, shares memories regarding the passing of a local celebrity known as Cliff Pallet, and introduces a guest performance involving musical farting.

topics.title: Will DeFarter's Musical and Chocolate Stunt
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Will DeFarter performs with various instruments and participates in a chocolate-syrup-related stunt involving another participant.

topics.title: Guest Appearances and Show Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio features a guest segment involving website promotions, a discussion on the performance of co-host Artie, and an introduction to actor George Takei.

topics.title: Reflections on Jackie Martling's Tenure
topics.summary: The studio discusses the professional tensions, contract negotiations, and personal dynamics involving former co-host Jackie Martling during his time on the show.

topics.title: Gilbert's Marriage and Upcoming Fatherhood
topics.summary: The studio explores Gilbert's personal life, including his traditional Jewish wedding, his lack of physical intimacy with his pregnant wife Dara, and his reported feelings of discomfort regarding the upcoming birth of their child.

topics.title: Gilbert Gottfried's Upcoming Performance and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Gilbert Gottfried discussing his upcoming comedy show at Caroline's, his personal life as a father-to-be, and various humorous anecdotes regarding his career and public persona.

topics.title: Debate on Adoption and Same-Sex Parenting
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated debate regarding the rights of same-sex couples to adopt children and the personal views of guests on gay marriage.

topics.title: Debate Over Cultural Topics and Music Rankings
topics.summary: The studio explores various topics including political commentary, personal anecdotes regarding family life, the absurdity of certain music rankings, and a news story about students being disciplined for using specific terminology in a play.

topics.title: Pop Culture Scandals and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including theater preferences, a teacher scandal involving a student with special needs, the production history of a Mick Jagger sitcom, rumors surrounding Anna Nicole Smith's funeral, and various celebrity anecdotes.
